# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "metadata": {
    "description": "Azure Function App with system-assigned managed identity and least-privilege role assignments for Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Wildcards are not supported in Azure RBAC built-in role definitions, so specific built-in roles are assigned."
  },
  "parameters": {
    "functionAppName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "hostingPlanName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 3,
      "maxLength": 24
    },
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "appInsightsName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string"

    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string"
    },

      "type": "string"
    },

      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    "skuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Y1"
    },
    "sqlAdminLogin": {
      "type": "secureString"
    },
    "sqlAdminPassword": {
      "type": "secureString"
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "storageBlobDataContributorRoleId": "ba92f5b4-2d11-453d-a403-e96b0029c9fe",

    "storageTableDataContributorRoleId": "0a9a7e1f-b9d0-4cc4-a60d-0319b160aaa3",
    "storageAccountContributorRoleId": "17d1049b-9a84-46fb-8f53-869881c3d3ab",
    "keyVaultSecretsUserRoleId": "4633458b-17de-408a-b874-0445c86b69e6",
    "keyVaultCryptoUserRoleId": "12338af0-0e69-4776-bea7-57ae8d297424",
    "cosmosDbOperatorRoleId": "230815da-be43-4aae-9cb4-875f7bd000aa",
    "monitoringMetricsPublisherRoleId": "3913510d-42f4-4e42-8a64-420c390055eb",
    "sqlServerResourceId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]",
    "sqlDatabaseResourceId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('sqlServerName'), parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]",
    "storageAccountResourceId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]",
    "keyVaultResourceId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]",
    "cosmosDbResourceId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))]",
    "appInsightsResourceId": "[resourceId('microsoft.insights/components', parameters('appInsightsName'))]",
    "functionAppIdentityRoleSeed": "[concat(resourceGroup().id, '/', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2023-05-01",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_LRS"
      },
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "properties": {
        "supportsHttpsTrafficOnly": true,
        "allowBlobPublicAccess": false,
        "minimumTlsVersion": "TLS1_2"
      }
    },

      "properties": {
        "Application_Type": "web"
      }
    },

      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",

          "name": "standard"

      "identity": {
        "type": "SystemAssigned"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('hostingPlanName'))]",
        "[variables('storageAccountResourceId')]",
        "[variables('appInsightsResourceId')]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "serverFarmId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('hostingPlanName'))]",
        "siteConfig": {
          "appSettings": [
            {
              "name": "AzureWebJobsStorage",
              "value": "[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=', parameters('storageAccountName'), ';AccountKey=', listKeys(variables('storageAccountResourceId'), '2023-05-01').keys[0].value, ';EndpointSuffix=', environment().suffixes.storage)]"
            },
            {
              "name": "FUNCTIONS_EXTENSION_VERSION",
              "value": "~4"
            },
            {
              "name": "FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME",
              "value": "dotnet-isolated"
            },
            {
              "name": "WEBSITE_RUN_FROM_PACKAGE",
              "value": "1"
            },

              "name": "APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING",

        "httpsOnly": true
      }

      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/administrators",
